summary: 5+ years of experience building end-to-end test automation frameworks using Python, Playwright, and Selenium. I specialize in designing scalable Page Object Model architectures, comprehensive regression suites, and seamless CI/CD integration for fast feedback loops.

experience.description: Led test automation strategy for payment processing platform.
achievements: Built Playwright E2E framework covering 120+ test scenarios
Reduced regression cycle from 4 hours to 25 minutes
Implemented CI/CD quality gates blocking broken builds

experience.description: Developed comprehensive test automation for checkout and inventory systems.
achievements: Created data-driven API test framework with httpx and pydantic
Achieved 95% code coverage across critical payment flows
Mentored 3 junior QA engineers on automation best practices

projects.name: E-Commerce Checkout Suite
projects.description: Full checkout flow automation with Playwright — cart, payment, order confirmation. 120+ test cases covering happy paths and edge cases across 3 browsers.

projects.name: REST API Framework
projects.description: Data-driven API test framework built with httpx and pydantic. Schema validation, request chaining, auto-generated reports, and contract testing on every PR.

projects.name: This Portfolio Demo
projects.description: The site you're viewing right now — tested with a live Playwright suite. Automated tests verify structure, responsiveness, and performance on every push.
